news.headline: Hamas Gaza Chief Hayya: Hamas will release four bodies of hostages on Thursday.
Colombia's leftists fail in election, causing stock rally.
Dominican Republic ends offer to purchase existing notes. Exact tendered amount undisclosed.
news.summary: The Dominican Republic made an announcement today stating that a significant amount of notes have been tendered as part of the offer to purchase outstanding notes for cash. The total principal amount of notes tendered has reached a notable figure. The Republic has been conducting a buyback program for its outstanding notes, and a substantial quantity of notes has been successfully tendered by investors.

news.headline: Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY) to report Q4 and full year 2024 results on Feb. 28, 2025, at 8:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Burlington, Massachusetts & New York, Butterfly Network, Inc. (NYSE: BFLY) shared plans to disclose its Q4 and full-year 2024 financial data on Friday, February 28, 2025, at 8:00 am ET. Butterfly, known for its portable ultrasound tech and user-friendly software, will have Joseph DeVivo, President, CEO, and Chairman of the Board, along with Heather Getz, EVP and Chief Financial Officer, leading the announcement.

news.headline: Algebrik AI partners with Corelation for enhanced personalization & financial inclusion in credit unions. #AI #Fintech #CloudNative.
news.summary: Algebrik AI Inc., based in New York City, has introduced the first cloud-native, AI-driven Loan Origination Platform (LOS). The company recently partnered with Corelation, a major provider of core processing solutions for credit unions. This collaboration allows Algebrik’s advanced LOS to integrate smoothly with Corelation’s KeyStone core system, providing credit unions with enhanced functionalities. Established in Delaware, Algebrik is at the forefront of digital financial technology, aiming to revolutionize loan origination processes.

news.headline: Cartrack launches Cartrack-Tag for secure asset control in commercial ops, designed for rapid tracking in challenging areas.
news.summary: Cartrack, a subsidiary of Karooooo Limited, has introduced Cartrack-Tag, a cutting-edge wireless asset tag aimed at addressing the growing demand for swift asset tracking of physical assets utilized in commercial settings. This innovative solution enhances visibility in tough environments, especially in areas with limited cellular network coverage. Cartrack-Tag allows businesses to reduce the time dedicated to locating assets efficiently. Karooooo Limited is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol KARO.

news.headline: US National Security Adviser Waltz: There will be talks about territory and security guarantees.
US National Security Adviser Waltz: There needs to be a permanent end to Ukraine war.
US National Security Adviser Waltz: Trump is determined to move very quickly on Ukraine.
Decibel Cannabis Co. expands global footprint. Announces entry into supply agreement. TSXV: DB, OTCQB: DBCCF.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on February 18, 2025, Decibel Cannabis Company Inc. (referred to as "Decibel") disclosed their recent expansion. As a top player in premium cannabis and extract manufacturing, they have broadened their reach globally. This strategic move was made through a supply agreement that the company signed. Decibel's stock is listed on the TSXV as DB and on the OTCQB as DBCCF.

news.headline: Plusgrade partners with Eurostar to offer upgrades like Eurostar Plus to eligible passengers, enhancing their rail travel experience globally.
news.summary: Plusgrade is expanding its rail services globally through a new partnership, offering ancillary revenue solutions to travel markets. Eurostar passengers now have the option to bid for upgrades to Eurostar Plus, which provides extra space and premium amenities. This collaboration aims to enhance the rail travel experience and generate increased revenue.

news.headline: Storykit's success in Europe leads to US expansion, as universities embrace its video platform for engaging communication.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Storykit's demonstrated success in Europe is gaining attention in the United States, prompting U.S. universities to embrace the platform to address the increasing need for captivating video communication. As institutions aim to meet the rising demand for visually appealing content, Storykit's impact is significant. The platform's influence has extended beyond Europe, with a noticeable uptick in adoption in the U.S. academic sector in response to the surging demand for accessible and engaging video content. This trend underscores the platform's effectiveness in catering to the changing communication preferences of audiences, displaying its potential to revolutionize how educational institutions deliver information.

news.headline: ApartmentRatings & SatisFacts announced winners of annual ApartmentRatings epIQ Top Rated Community Awards. Los Angeles, Feb. 18, 2025.
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, in Los Angeles, ApartmentRatings, a leading ratings and reviews platform for renters across the country, revealed the recipients of the ApartmentRatings epIQ Top Rated Community Awards for the year. These prestigious awards recognize outstanding multifamily communities nationwide based on resident feedback and reviews. The winners were selected from a pool of numerous communities, highlighting the top-tier service and quality experience offered by these exceptional properties.

news.headline: Kavalan launches rare Palo Cortado cask whisky, hints of vanilla, cardamom, and orange pound cake. Selling out fast in Taiwan.
news.summary: A new, top-quality whisky from Kavalan Distillery is impressing consumers with its flavors of vanilla fruitcake, cardamom, and orange pound cake. Released in Taiwan in January 2025, this special expression was aged in a rare Palo Cortado sherry cask. The demand for this exceptional whisky is high, with sales skyrocketing since its recent launch.

news.headline: Life Time (NYSE: LTH) recognized as Great Place to Work certified, Feb 18, 2025. Shows outstanding work environment.
news.summary: Life Time, a leading healthy lifestyle brand based in CHANHASSEN, Minn., revealed on Feb. 18, 2025, that it has achieved recognition as a certified Great Place To Work company. This prestigious accreditation highlights the exceptional work environment maintained by the company. Life Time, listed on NYSE as LTH, is proud to earn this national accolade, solidifying its status as a top employer in the nation.

news.headline: Autism service providers ASI and QBS merge to form Alongside, led by industry veteran Ronit Molko as CEO.
news.summary: Ronit Molko, a pioneer in the autism services sector with 35 years of experience, has been appointed as the CEO of Alongside. The merger of Autism Spectrum Interventions (ASI) and Quality Behavior Solutions (QBS) was confirmed on Feb. 18, 2025, in Fullerton, California. This move brings together the expertise of both organizations to provide enhanced services.

news.headline: Essen Health Care partners with OwnaHealth to improve diabetes and obesity care for underserved communities.  #Bronx #Healthcare
news.summary: On February 18, 2025, Essen Health Care, a prominent multi-specialty healthcare provider based in the Bronx, New York, unveiled a significant collaboration with OwnaHealth, a forward-thinking healthcare entity focused on alleviating the effects of diabetes. This partnership aims to enhance health equity and address the challenges posed by diabetes, a pressing global health issue. With this alliance, Essen Health Care seeks to bolster its efforts in combating diabetes and improving health outcomes for individuals.

news.headline: Boeing chooses Covalent for optimized structured on-the-job training. Covalent's solution to enable SOJT for mechanics and quality.
news.summary: In Boston on February 18, 2025, Covalent, a top provider of Workforce Operations software for intricate discrete manufacturing, revealed that Boeing has opted for Covalent's Capability Management solution. This choice aims to facilitate Structured On-the-Job Training ("SOJT") for mechanics and quality personnel.

news.headline: BoldHaus Groove 2025 Growth Summit in Fort Lauderdale offering playbook for scaling B2B business.
news.summary: Fort Lauderdale will host the return of BoldHaus Groove for consultants, coaches, and service-based businesses seeking to scale up. BoldHaus Groove 2025, a growth summit, is now open for registration. Taking place on Feb. 18, 2025, the event promises to provide a proven playbook for attendees to enhance their businesses. With a focus on growth strategies, this summit aims to equip participants with the tools they need to succeed. This event is geared towards professionals looking to expand their consultancy or coaching enterprises.

news.headline: Hugoton Royalty Trust (OTCQB: HGTXU) declares no Feb cash distribution as Trustee cites excess cost positions.
news.summary: Argent Trust Company, acting as the Trustee of the Hugoton Royalty Trust, revealed that there will be no cash distribution for February 2025 to unit holders due to cost positions surpassing revenues. This announcement was made on February 18, 2025. The Hugoton Royalty Trust is listed on OTCQB under the ticker symbol HGTXU.

news.headline: DiligentIQ secures $12M in Series A funding led by FINTOP Capital to enhance AI-powered due diligence in private markets. Co-founded by KKR alum Ed Brandman.
news.summary: A New York-based company, DiligentIQ, specializing in AI-driven due diligence for private equity firms, has successfully raised Series A funding. The funding round was spearheaded by FINTOP Capital and JAM FINTOP. The company, founded by former KKR executive Ed Brandman, aims to revolutionize the due diligence process using artificial intelligence technology. This investment marks a significant milestone for DiligentIQ as they continue to innovate in the private equity sector.

news.headline: "Bitcoin mining conference 'Mining Disrupt 2025' on March 25-27 in Fort Lauderdale – largest event of its kind."
news.summary: A major Bitcoin mining conference, Mining Disrupt 2025, is set to return on March 25-27, 2025, in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. This event will be held at the Broward Convention Center and is expected to be the largest gathering of its kind. Participants can look forward to a two-day program filled with innovation and valuable networking opportunities.

news.headline: HUB International appoints Carol Murphy as North American Casualty Practice Leader, specializing in tailored insurance solutions.
news.summary: Hub International Limited (HUB), a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services firm, has officially emphasized its expertise in customized casualty insurance and risk financing solutions. The company, based in Chicago, disclosed on February 18, 2025, the selection of Carol Murphy to a significant role.

news.headline: Gridwise reports on gig mobility trends for 2024 and 2025, with challenges in rising consumer prices and stagnating driver wages.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh, on February 18, 2025, the gig mobility sector is encountering fresh obstacles as consumer costs surge and riders resist fare hikes. Concurrently, driver pay remains stagnant and utilization rates are struggling to grow, presenting challenges for the industry.

news.headline: Renova Technology named 2025 PCB Repair Services Company of the Year by Semiconductor Review board.
news.summary: Renova Technology, based in Norcross, Georgia, was recognized on February 18, 2025, as the PCB Repair Services Company of the Year for 2025. This prestigious award was bestowed upon them by a panel of industry experts and the editorial board of Semiconductor Review. Renova Technology's outstanding accomplishments in the field were acknowledged, solidifying their reputation as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: Kyorin and Cyrano Therapeutics signed an option agreement for CYR-064 in Japan, offering upfront and milestone payments, plus royalties from commercialization.
news.summary: Cyrano Therapeutics has struck a deal granting them upfront and milestone payments, along with royalties upon the commercialization of CYR-064 in Japan. This agreement, announced on February 18, 2025 in Delray Beach, Florida, marks a significant development for the clinical-stage regenerative medicine company. Under the terms of the agreement, Cyrano Therapeutics stands to benefit financially from the deal, receiving payments at different stages of development and a share of profits from the product's launch in the Japanese market.

news.headline: Agnes America partners exclusively with Monarch Aesthetic Services in the U.S., enhancing access to dermatology technologies.
news.summary: In Laguna Hills, California, on February 18, 2025, Agnes America, a reputable manufacturer specializing in dermatology-driven technologies, has unveiled their new strategic collaboration with Monarch Aesthetic Services. This partnership aims to benefit medical aesthetic practices seeking expansion opportunities. The partnership combines Agnes America's expertise in advanced technologies with Monarch Aesthetic Services, a leading ally in the industry. The details of the agreement and its scope were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Nfinite to launch VXP™ at eTail Palm Springs 2025, revamping product visuals with AI. Over $130M in financing raised.
news.summary: A cutting-edge AI-powered technology has been developed to enhance low-quality product images into high-quality, immersive visuals on a large scale. The unveiling of this new Visual Experience by Nfinite, a leading company in AI-driven product visualization, will take place in San Francisco on February 18, 2025. With a substantial $130 million raised in funding thus far, Nfinite remains at the forefront of innovation in this field.

news.headline: OppFi increases revolving credit facility with Blue Owl Capital affiliates to $300 million, up from $250 million. Blue Owl acquired Atalaya Capital in Sep 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago, OppFi Inc. (NYSE:OPFI), a tech-based finance platform, revealed an expansion in its revolving credit facility within one of its subsidiaries and Blue Owl Capital Inc. The facility has risen to $300 million from $250 million. Blue Owl, which acquired Atalaya Capital Management in September 2024, is playing a significant role in this financial development. OppFi focuses on enhancing credit accessibility for average Americans by collaborating with community banks.

news.headline: U.S. saw 32.6% cash home purchases in 2024, down from 35.1% in 2023, lowest since 2021, per Redfin report. Cash sales up from pre-pandemic levels.
news.summary: In 2024, approximately 32.6% of U.S. home purchases were conducted in cash, marking a decrease from 35.1% in the previous year and the lowest percentage since 2021. The data, sourced from a recent report by Redfin, a technology-driven real estate firm, also indicates that all-cash transactions accounted for a larger proportion of home sales compared to the pre-pandemic period, during which the percentage ranged between 25% and 30%. This information is based on Redfin's examination of home purchase records at the county level.

news.headline: Toronto Tech Week set for June 23-27, 2025, citywide event. Partners offer demos, chats, hackathons, and more. Celebrate Toronto's tech community.
news.summary: Toronto Tech Week is scheduled to occur in Toronto from June 23 to June 27, 2025. This annual weeklong event will feature a variety of experiences, including panels, fireside chats, demos, hackathons, open houses, and social events. It aims to bring together partners from the tech community and will take place citywide. Toronto Tech Week is a local initiative highlighting innovation and community spirit, emphasizing Toronto's voices, talent, and ambitions.

news.headline: ESP Facility Services launches new website, esp-green.com, showcasing growth and innovation. Provides enhanced experience for clients.
news.summary: Based in Hayward, California, ESP Facility Services, a pioneer in sustainable facility management and commercial cleaning, has unveiled its updated website, esp-green.com. The revamped site signifies ESP's progress and dedication to advancement, catering to clients and partners with a more engaging experience. The fresh digital platform offers a simplified, user-centric interface highlighting ESP Facility Service's full range of services, emphasizing their commitment to innovation and growth.

news.headline: Venu Holding Corp extends to year-round operations with multi-season venue model; targets new revenue growth. NYSE: VENU.
news.summary: A company called Venu Holding Corporation, traded on the NYSE American under ticker symbol VENU, based in Colorado Springs, announced its innovative approach to venue configuration. This approach involves extending operational capacity from seasonal to year-round for its upscale live music venues and premium hospitality destinations. The new model aims to boost revenue potential for the company. This initiative will apply to the company's new amphitheaters and other venues it owns.

news.headline: ON24 appoints May O’Neal as CHRO, to lead global HR function, talent strategy for high-performance teams, innovation.
news.summary: In San Francisco today, ON24 (NYSE: ONTF) revealed that May O'Neal is the new Chief Human Resources Officer. O'Neal will now oversee the global HR function at ON24, focusing on building strong teams, enhancing leadership, and promoting a culture of accountability and innovation. O'Neal's leadership background in cultivating people-centric cultures will play a vital role in driving ON24's talent and people strategy forward.

news.headline: RiteScreen acquires FlexScreen to enhance customer value, strengthen growth strategy. Major step in product expansion.
news.summary: In Elizabethville, Pennsylvania, The RiteScreen Company, a top independent manufacturer of window screens and patio door screens in North America, has announced the strategic acquisition of FlexScreen, a pioneer in flexible screen technology. This move marks a major advancement in RiteScreen's growth plan, showing its dedication to providing exceptional value to customers, stakeholders, and partners. FlexScreen, which was founded, brings innovative expertise to RiteScreen's operations as they continue to expand their market presence.

news.headline: Record shareholder activism in the U.S. with 1,000 companies globally targeted in 2024, uptrend of 7% in public campaigns from 2023.
news.summary: In 2024, more than 1,000 companies worldwide engaged with activists, and the United States market experienced a significant increase in activity with close to 600 public campaigns, marking a 7% rise from 2023 and a 16% surge compared to 2022. These insights were highlighted in the Diligent Market Intelligence: Shareholder Activism Annual Review 2025 report by Diligent. The report also noted that activists focused on U.S. boards attained a reduced number of seats, even through settlements, during the period.

news.headline: Boxlight introduces Clevertouch Max 2, an interactive display, offering various user interfaces and software options for education.
news.summary: Boxlight Corporation (Nasdaq: BOXL), a prominent player in educational technology, has unveiled the Clevertouch Max 2 in Duluth, Ga. This cutting-edge interactive display is being launched as the inaugural display bearing the Clevertouch insignia as Boxlight’s international display benchmark. The Clevertouch Max 2 is unique in its versatility, offering various interface choices and software selections for whiteboarding and screensharing, making it the sole interactive display in the education sector with this capability. Demonstrating Boxlight’s dedication to empowering education, the Clevertouch Max 2 is set to revolutionize the educational display landscape.

news.headline: Avnet to join Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference on March 3. #PHOENIX, Business Wire.
news.summary: Avnet, a company based in Phoenix, will be partaking in the Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference scheduled for March 3. This event is significant as it provides a platform for Avnet to engage with institutional investors and showcase their business strategies. The conference will play host to a large number of investors and industry professionals, offering Avnet an opportunity to network and potentially attract new investors. Events like these are crucial for companies like Avnet to communicate their vision and financial performance to key stakeholders and the investment community.

news.headline: Singulr AI launches platform in Palo Alto to help enterprises manage AI surge.
news.summary: A new company called Singulr AI has been established in Palo Alto, California. They have officially released their enterprise AI governance and security platform to the public.

news.headline: Will Eide joins Rothschild & Co as Managing Director in Technology Team. Brings 15 yrs experience in M&A transactions. Based in New York.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Rothschild & Co revealed that Will Eide has taken on the role of Managing Director in the Technology Team of its Global Advisory business. With over 15 years of expertise in guiding M&A transactions, capital raises, and restructurings within the technology industry, Mr. Eide now joins the firm. His base of operations will be in New York. His extensive experience includes a successful history of overseeing prominent M&A deals in the legal tech and enterprise sectors.

news.headline: MirrorTab receives $8.5M funding to protect web apps from ever-changing cyber threats like hacking, bots, and malware.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the government plans to invest $10 million in upgrading the public transportation system. This investment aims to improve service reliability and increase the number of buses on the road by 20%. The government also announced the introduction of a new mobile app that will allow passengers to track bus arrival times in real-time. The public transportation upgrades are expected to benefit over 500,000 daily commuters in the city.

news.headline: Viant in Irvine, CA, sets date for Q4 & full year 2024 financial results release and conference call.
news.summary: Tech company Viant has disclosed that it will release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The announcement includes the date for the release along with the details of a conference call that will take place regarding the results. This information indicates that Viant is gearing up to provide crucial numbers and performance updates to its stakeholders and the public.

news.headline: Estate Registry provides 3 months free access to LegacyNow platform for Californian families impacted by wildfires.
news.summary: A generous initiative has been launched in Los Angeles to aid California families affected by the devastating wildfires. The Estate Registry is providing three months of free access to its platform, LegacyNow, for all state residents. This offer is intended to assist families in safeguarding important memories and essential documents during this period of upheaval caused by the wildfires. The program aims to support families who have had to evacuate or are coming back to homes that have been damaged or completely destroyed.

news.headline: CDW CFO to speak at Morgan Stanley Conference in San Francisco. Nasdaq: CDW. Serving US, UK, Canada.
news.summary: Vernon Hills, Illinois – CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW), a prominent provider of IT solutions serving business, government, education, and healthcare sectors in the US, UK, and Canada, disclosed that Albert J. Miralles, the company's Senior VP and CFO, is set for a Q&A session at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco, California. This event will take place on Tuesday.

news.headline: Veradigm introduces cardiometabolic clinical registry datasets to advance real-world research using de-identified patient health data.
news.summary: Veradigm® (MDRX), a prominent healthcare data and technology solutions provider, unveiled disease-specific cardiometabolic Clinical Data Registry datasets. These datasets offer de-identified patient health and care details, catering to a particular condition. Researchers now have access to specialized, Natural Language Processing (NLP)-enhanced real-world data to enhance comprehension of patient insights. The release of these datasets marks a significant step in advancing research with precise information for the better understanding of patient care.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: US and Russia agree to restore embassy staffing - AP.
Safe Pro Group to showcase Drone AI-Powered SpotlightAI technology at XPONENTIAL Europe in Düsseldorf from Feb 18-20, 2025.
news.summary: AVENTURA, Florida- Safe Pro Group Inc. (Nasdaq: SPAI), a prominent artificial intelligence (AI) solutions provider focusing on drone imagery processing, shared news that its Safe Pro AI subsidiary is set to showcase its patented Drone AI-Powered SpotlightAITM technology at XPONENTIAL Europe. This technology presentation will be featured at the renowned European trade fair for autonomous technologies and robotics, scheduled to happen in Düsseldorf, Germany from February 18th to February 20th, 2025. This event will serve as a platform for Safe Pro AI to exhibit its innovative solution to a wide audience of industry professionals and enthusiasts.

news.headline: Soluna Holdings, Inc. exits ERCOT planning for Project Kati, paving the way for 166 MW of renewable energy capacity.
news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ as SLNH, has completed the planning stage with Electric Reliability Council of Texas (ERCOT) for Project Kati. This project, aimed at developing green data centers for demanding computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and AI, is now set for construction and growth following this crucial milestone. Project Kati is set to provide a renewable energy capacity of up to 166 MW.

news.headline: Apex's 100 MW Great Kiskadee Storage in Texas begins commercial operations, aiding grid reliability and wildlife conservation efforts.
news.summary: Commercial operations have commenced at the Great Kiskadee Storage facility in Texas, developed by Apex with a capacity of 100 MW. This launch aims to bolster grid reliability while also contributing to wildlife conservation efforts in the region.

news.headline: GNFZ partners with OTEC in Brazil to advance net zero buildings, expanding certification services in Latin America.
news.summary: A strategic partnership between the Global Network for Zero (GNFZ) and OTEC, Brazil's leading sustainability consulting firm, was announced today in Washington. This collaboration signifies a major advancement in net zero certification services in Latin America. OTEC is now recognized as the inaugural GNFZ Partner in Brazil, forming a robust alliance to promote sustainable construction practices in the region. Brazil, known for its pioneering role in sustainable building initiatives, has emerged as a key player in driving this progress. The partnership is set to enhance efforts to foster environmentally-friendly building standards across the nation.
